warnings: Dropped 1 non-scored row(s) worth 0 points (Penalty Points). Check they really aren't scored.
_review.note: Machine-parsed from the official rating sheet. plan.md F3: nobody may be graded against this until a human confirms it.
_review.paraphrase_note: Descriptions and level descriptors are restated in our own words (plan.md §20). Criterion names and every point value are exactly as published on the official rating sheet.

criteria.name: Demonstrates understanding of the role play and defines problem(s) to be solved

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: The participant did not offer a summary of the role play scenario or identify any issues.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: The participant either presented a summary of the role play scenario or identified the problems, but not both.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The participant both summarized the role play scenario and clearly stated the problems.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The participant showed a deep understanding of the role play scenario and precisely articulated the problems.

criteria.name: Identifies alternatives and the pro(s) and con(s) of each

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: No potential solutions were presented.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: One or more alternative solutions were offered, but their advantages and/or disadvantages were not examined.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: A minimum of two alternative solutions were presented, and their benefits and drawbacks were analyzed.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: Several alternative solutions were provided, with a thorough analysis of multiple advantages and disadvantages for each one.

criteria.name: Identifies logical solution and aspects of implementation

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: No proposed resolution was put forward.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: A solution was suggested, but a plan for putting it into practice was not created.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: A sensible solution was presented, along with a well-formed plan for its execution.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: A practical solution was developed, complete with an implementation plan and an outline of the required resources.

criteria.name: Demonstrates knowledge and understanding of the event knowledge areas
criteria.description: This criterion assesses understanding across several key areas: setting up and configuring networks, securing and restoring networks, managing network operations, planning network infrastructure, and knowledge of network communication rules, services, and access methods.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: No understanding of the specified knowledge areas was shown.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: Understanding was evident in only one or two of the knowledge areas.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: Understanding was evident in three of the knowledge areas.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: Understanding was evident in four or more of the knowledge areas.

criteria.name: Statements are well-organized and clearly stated

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: The competitor(s) did not appear ready.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: The competitor(s) were prepared, but the presentation lacked a coherent flow.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The presentation progressed in a logical order.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The presentation progressed in a logical order, and all statements were well-structured.

criteria.name: Consistently displays confidence, poised body language, engaging eye contact, and effective voice projection.

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: None of the specified presentation abilities were exhibited.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: One or two of the specified presentation abilities (self-assurance, posture, eye contact, or vocal delivery) were demonstrated.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: Three of the specified presentation abilities (self-assurance, posture, eye contact, or vocal delivery) were demonstrated.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: All specified presentation abilities were demonstrated, which significantly improved the overall delivery.

criteria.name: Demonstrates the ability to effectively answer questions

levels.label: Not Demonstrated
levels.descriptor: The participant was unable to respond to questions.

levels.label: Below Expectations
levels.descriptor: The participant did not provide full answers to questions.

levels.label: Meets Expectations
levels.descriptor: The participant provided complete answers to questions.

levels.label: Exceeds Expectations
levels.descriptor: The participant engaged with the judges while providing thorough answers to questions.
